title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Square Yards - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Square Yards - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!
